summary: New internal/store/extensions.go: pp_-prefixed tables that don't map to a spec endpoint — pp_dataset_items (normalized cross-Actor items) with an FTS5 index + insert/delete triggers, pp_actor_run_history (cost-relevant run metadata), pp_presets (named Actor input presets), pp_workflow_runs (workflow execution log). Exposes EnsureExtensions, UpsertNormalizedItem, HashesSeen, RecordActorRun, LoadActorRunHistory, SavePreset, LoadPreset.
rationale: The generator's store mirrors spec endpoints; the novel features need a normalized item table with full-text search plus run-history and preset persistence.
